holdings.infoBox: CXSE is an equity ETF with a total of 261 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 7.51%, Alibaba Group Holding at 6.75%, Zhongji Innolight at 5.02%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 4.61%, and Eoptolink Technology Inc. at 2.88%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree China ex-State-Owned Enterprises Fund (CXSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of Chinese companies that are not state-owned, defined as government ownership of less than 20%. CXSE was launched on Sep 19, 2012 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Chinese stocks just saw worst week since October, but a few China ETFs are still beating the market
data.text: The Shanghai stock market is down nearly 6% this week, but several exchange-traded funds that hold Chinese stocks are still beating the S&P 500.
